Peter,

Right now, 34 of the 50 governors in this country are Republicans -- that's a LOT!

One of our best opportunities to turn one of those red seats blue is Maryland, where we put Gov. Larry Hogan "On Notice" for vetoing expanding earned sick leave legislation and refusing to protect Planned Parenthood from attacks by congressional Republicans.

We've endorsed Maya Rockeymoore Cummings because we know she is the best person to defeat him next year.

**[Donate $3 to send your support to Maya-- 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6879/24c69fd9/14d0c39c2/1890630e/2362964049/VEsE/ "https://emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/maya-rockeymoore-cummings?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+send+your+support+to+Maya+md&utm_campaign=WQEFCL26N_digital_email_20171218_MayaRCCandFR_inact&source=WQEFCL26N_digital_email_20171218_MayaRCCandFR_inact")**

Last year, Hillary Clinton swamped Donald Trump by more than 25 points in Maryland.

Maryland's strong Democratic streak is why this primary has gotten crowded, fast.

Maya's bold vision for the state and her outstanding record as a progressive fighter are why we know she's the best person to take on Hogan and turn this seat blue.

**Donate $3 to help Maya break through her crowded primary and turn Maryland blue -- 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign:**

name: The White House
subject: A return to principled realism
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e86f2eb4f89d6c70ed72d6fddd72fb2bd4d89b8f1ef4af14455cd099de6dd0cff9fa80c09e8d9c2ad22dcbb456c808f2b8bb0003a9342904

A return to principled realism

Joined by Vice President Mike Pence and members of the Cabinet, President Donald J. Trump formally unveiled his Administration’s National Security Strategy (NSS) at the Ronald Reagan Building and International Trade Center yesterday.

This NSS is an expression of the President’s belief that putting America first is the key to renewing confidence in our leadership. “Our new strategy is based on a principled realism, guided by our vital national interests, and rooted in our timeless values,” President Trump said. “Whether we like it or not, we are engaged in a new era of competition.”

Those vital national interests take four specific forms:

1. Protect the homeland, the American people, and the American way of life

2. Promote American prosperity

3. Preserve peace through strength

4. Advance American influence

At 65 pages, the NSS will serve as the foundation for more granular security plans, including the National Counterterrorism Strategy, the Nuclear Posture Review, and the Ballistic Missile Defense Review.

Read:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e86f2eb4f89d6c7094d6e0a5733e54dab22b8c0cf26380037641fc5ff479d7dcd099db90fc0d6e359a798f12280e44e75f818e389f04d81f
A New National Security Strategy for a New Era

‘Base it on love of our country’

Last week, as Americans went about preparing for the Christmas season, they were jarred by a sight seldom witnessed in a U.S. city: a terrorist exploding a pipe bomb on a busy subway passage.

The suspect arrived through chain migration, an outdated entry system for immigrants based on family ties rather than any merit-driven criteria. In addition to undermining national security, chain migration tends to cause more lower-skilled immigration, which puts greater strain on federal welfare.

“It is time to create a merit-based immigration system that makes sense for a modern economy,” President Trump said. “Base it on love of our country. We want people that come in, that can love our country.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e86f2eb4f89d6c7090436b7af76432540a6873aca2312dd8b79a8b471a919086ea7af456c19db0a0b54e049138875cd2961793479487b464
Watch—or read—the President’s Weekly Address on chain migration here.

Bonus: 15 graphics show why it’s
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e86f2eb4f89d6c70f01bdf6a277655802cf3dcbec6df1180387b266f96bb49ef0d2b6b346d5a3a5af0b9e347b3838aa35fd1ac1d11b85743
time to replace chain migration with a merit-based system

Six days and counting

As we count down to Christmas next week, Second Lady Karen Pence offers a glimpse of her and Vice President Mike Pence’s favorite tree this holiday season—one adorned with red, white, and blue ornaments made by children of U.S. military families.

“We honor military service members and their families,” the Second Lady said. “We appreciate the sacrifices you make to protect our freedoms, especially around this time of year.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e86f2eb4f89d6c70de524089f25f5d86418269501c7232e391dc510776e9c1033200f26ace2e639a27a33bf85c213c46f1e84fb2ae45e836
Watch the Second Lady’s video here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks regarding the Administration’s National Security Strategy | December 18, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

POTUS TODAY

President Trump will meet with Secretary of Defense James Mattis. Vice President Pence will participate in the Senate Republican Policy lunch, followed by a series of meetings with lawmakers at the U. S. Capitol.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e86f2eb4f89d6c700a5c14dbd6ec5f67126de8242af697f9f36e15852dd8745d4e30e9c11f8ca404754e0944834fadd9368e9fdc63658889
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e86f2eb4f89d6c70a4a94308a9515e707ee2d96b19092978591229464d7b751b3d3039c9885ba4fb2e21b8749a835355cf325a4802742f4f
Contact the White House |

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Worst. Resolution. Ever. (cutting Medicare)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend, We have it from both sides of the Capitol. Speaker Paul Ryan and Florida's very own Senator Marco Rubio have both admitted that the GOP will try to cut Medicare and Social Security in the New Year. To them, this is the fulfillment of years of work. To me, it's the worst New Year's resolution ever. **And to seniors and their families all across Florida, this is something that could ruin their financial stability.** I'm fighting to protect seniors. I need to know that you are fighting beside me. [_**We have a big FEC goal this month -- $20,000 by the 31st. Will you help us reach it?**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e50/622b7b5b/1852474a/307ba3dc/2705155888/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171221?refcode=dwse171221_m&recurring=true&amount=5") It's not like this is a surprise. Republicans have attacked Medicare and Social Security for a long time. And with Trump in the White House, they might just get what they want. I can promise you this -- **as long as Republicans come after Medicare and Social Security, I will stand in their way.** That position doesn't make me very popular with President Trump or his Administration. But that doesn't matter to me. As long as seniors in Florida and around the country can keep their Medicare and Social Security, they can attack me all they like. I need you on my side and we need to continue to grow our team, today. The FEC quarter ends on the 31st, and we need to get to our $20,000 goal. [_**Stand with me by rushing in $5 or more.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e50/622b7b5b/1852474a/307ba3dc/2705155888/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171221?refcode=dwse171221_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you. Debbie |

That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=01a420cbe11f4f459ead5f5f6455c2a1&_e=x-cIvW1QXDxeW_7ow5BEYbv8iJ4S9lmtwoMIw9YwwSMACxvIZkAFeC9l5qDULtWFu6FEarPj3vSwkF5lnNOuWgkV9CEypcx8DauvazY4i5HmEOgFj-akRt3K0ebQnxL7GY-zJDefcALelMDKIreZMvqNKlRTln6xRcBQVRFUIelczgxV5-12weQHLk2-qVkPT0wtRyNjJyMINzbZkWSVMBSzeVn-fP1toNuntJ--JxLRCbytvgSCpvlIUlbBJk4f4ecaQnL19CSI3yDrjfkXvmP5oMEeI1RW3PljNAYDDT9_UMO8w2C5WNQxB8sqyjfSFJmEkeSzkFlszZNLnINIPAkAv2q0Xa6u0LpcYxQcnB5lk8GLfbPHQOzr6VGKzeS1) that you care about? name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: breathtaking betrayal of the middle class
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
When Donald Trump ran for president, he promised to fight for the "forgotten Americans," those struggling to find work and provide for their families.

If there was ever any doubt about his real intentions, this GOP Tax Scam has made them crystal clear. It is a complete betrayal of middle class Americans and a massive transfer of wealth to billionaires and big corporations.

And that's not all. This bill will give FOREIGN stockholders a $48 billion windfall in 2019 alone while INCREASING taxes for 8 million American families who make less than $200,000 a year. No matter how you slice it, this is not a tax bill that puts Americans first.

[**We need to raise our voices against this corruption. Let members of the House and the Senate know that the American people reject this GOP Tax Scam and will hold them accountable for this relentless assault on the middle class >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b94/70cdc2ba/46db41e5/390244d/634470778/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-against-the-republcian-tax-bill?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+need+to+raise+our+voices+against+this&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_171219&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_171219")

It's hard to believe, but the plan got even worse on Friday, when last-minute tax cuts were inserted that will personally give President Trump a tax break worth tens of millions.

These cuts will benefit real estate developers and others who use "pass-through" entities as part of their business. According to experts, this change will only benefit the wealthy and will do nothing to create jobs.

[**Sign here to stand against this unjust bill designed to help big corporations and the wealthiest Americans >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b94/70cdc2ba/46db41e5/390244a/634470778/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-against-the-republcian-tax-bill?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Sign+here+to+stand+against+this+unjust+b&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_171219&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_171219")

The scam of running for president on economic populism and then pushing through a bill that hurts the middle class and helps only himself and his fellow wealthy Americans is breathtaking hypocrisy -- even for Donald Trump.

Thank you for fighting with me to hold Trump and Congressional Republicans accountable for this outrage.

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

Kensington, MD 20895

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Big news: One vote margin decides the Virginia House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

This afternoon in Newport News, Democratic Delegate-elect Shelly Simonds saw firsthand something we often talk about: the power of a single vote.

How many times have you gotten an email or a phone call or a knock on your door from an excited Democrat talking about how YOUR vote matters? I'm guessing quite a few -- and if you were ever looking for definitive proof that all those folks were telling the truth, this is it. Every. Single. Vote. Matters.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-founding-donor?refcode=20171219&amount=25

I was so proud to campaign with Shelly this fall, and I'll be even prouder to call her Delegate Simonds this winter. She won her race 11,608 to 11,607. A single conversation with a single voter can persuade them to go vote -- and that single voter can be responsible for a flipped seat. And that flipped seat can determine a majority. This is the first time Republicans haven't won a House majority in Virginia since the 1990s; the Virginia House of Delegates now stands at a 50-50 makeup, with more recounts to go.

And we can take it one step further than that: A single dollar donated can help fund that critically important single conversation. We read a lot about campaign finance and big donors and special interests, and it's true that folks like the NRA will be pouring money into my race to try to get me out of the Senate. But the way my team will power our re-election efforts is with real people like you digging deep and giving what you can.

So will you sign up to become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign right now?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-founding-donor?refcode=20171219&amount=25

Thank you -- I'm feeling so inspired by today's results, and I can't wait to get our campaign going. I'm so glad you're a part of it.

Tim

DONATE
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-founding-donor?refcode=20171219&amount=25 ]

We are not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks in connection with this mailer.

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please unsubscribe [ http://action.timkaine.com/p/salsa/supporter/unsubscribe/public/?Email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_blast_KEY=1382950 ].

clean_body: Derek, Over his eight years in office, President Obama oversaw a bureaucratic state that sought to regulate anything and everything. ****In 2015, this system of regulatory burdens made it to the internet. Last week, the Obama era internet regulations were repealed by President Trump's FCC - But Democrats are hoping to overturn this repeal by any means necessary. While our federal delegation spreads massive misinformation about this and many other issues, Republicans are working on dismantling the regulatory behemoth that President Obama constructed. New Hampshire deserves members of Congress who are opposed to unnecessary regulations.
